sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73086" key="o)ligotoki/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀλῐγοτοκ-ία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n73086.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the bringing forth of few,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0086.tlg012:771b:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">771b6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
